answer: Airtable provides developer API access on its Free plan, which is a self-serve tier managed directly through your workspace settings [1][2][3]. The Free plan includes a monthly limit of 1,000 API calls per workspace [4][3]. While you can access most Base Data endpoints, the Public API limit is actively enforced for Free plan users [5]. Additionally, all API traffic is subject to a rate limit of 5 requests per second, or 50 requests per second when using personal access tokens [6].
